t_ch: 那当然！这里可是匹诺康尼，什么没有？
t_en: Absolutely! This is Penacony after all. You can literally find anything here!

t_ch: 你这家伙…一看就是新来的吧？有空多去星辰的时刻转转吧……
t_en: You must be new here, right?... You really should check it out at the Moment of Stars...

t_ch: 「星辰的时刻」又是什么？
t_en: What is the Moment of Stars?

t_ch: …哎！你这人，怎么什么都不知道啊？该不会是偷渡进来的吧……
t_en: ...Hey! How can you be so clueless about Penacony? You didn't sneak into this place, did you...?

t_ch: 算了…既然你都诚心诚意地问了，我也不妨大发慈悲地给你讲讲——
t_en: Well... What a question, how brazen indeed! I'll answer these questions when I feel the need!

t_ch: 听好了，所谓的「梦想之城」匹诺康尼，其实是由<unbreak>12</unbreak>个独立的梦境共同组成的，其中每个梦境都对应时钟的一个刻度。
t_en: Listen up, the so-called City of Dreams is made of <unbreak>12</unbreak> discreet dream worlds, each corresponding to a "moment" on the clock.

t_ch: 「星辰的时刻」是第十一个梦境，那里遍地都是俱乐部，每天都在不停进行着各种比赛——球笼、机动球、独轮车大赛…什么都有！
t_en: The "Moment of Stars" is the eleventh dreamscape, where you'll find all sorts of clubs and various competitions all day... Spheroid, Roboball, Unicycler... you name it!

t_ch: 行了，给你讲了这么多，你先去看几场比赛再找我聊吧。和外行人聊天，我实在是提不起兴致。
t_en: Alright, I've told you enough. Go watch a few games before coming back to talk to me. I'm not too keen on discussing with laypeople.

t_ch: 昨晚的机动球比赛可真刺激！依我看，苏乐达真该把对面的<unbreak>23</unbreak>号给买过去！
t_en: The Roboball game last night was thrilling! You know what? SoulGlad seriously should have snagged No. <unbreak>23</unbreak> from the other team!

t_ch: 你说，是不是这个理？
t_en: Don't you agree?

t_ch: 昨晚的比赛怎么样？
t_en: How was the game last night?

t_ch: 只能说…那啥，冠军队伍，亦有差距！一群废柴，一场大败！哈哈哈。
t_en: Let's just say... there was a huge gap between the finalist teams. What a landslide victory! Hahaha!

t_ch: 要我说啊，苏乐达真该把对面的<unbreak>23</unbreak>号给买过去，花再大价钱也值得——他那群队友都是什么玩意！关键时候就该把球塞给关键球员，结果呢？那群边角料，连支援都打不好！
t_en: You know what? SoulGlad seriously should have snagged No. <unbreak>23</unbreak> from the other team! His teammates were incompetent nincompoops and didn't even know to pass him the ball when it really mattered! Those tender feet can't even play support decently!

t_ch: 你说，是不是这个理？
t_en: Don't you agree?

t_ch: 如是。
t_en: I totally agree.

t_ch: …什么乱七八糟的？唉，我花那么大价钱跑过来，就是想看场精彩的比赛，没想到票钱没值回来，饭倒是喂得饱饱的！
t_en: Ah, what a disaster! I spent a fortune hoping for an epic game, the ticket price wasn't worth it at all, although the food was decent...

t_ch: 哈，苏乐达可真是…还搁这等他回来呢！回不去了，上标记了！我花那么大价钱跑过来，可不是为了看他们全场梦游的！
t_en: Hah, SoulGlad... they're still waiting for him to come back? No way, man! I'm telling you! I didn't spend a fortune to watch such a letdown of a game!

t_ch: 你有什么高见？
t_en: What do you think about it?

t_ch: 哎…也不知道这个赛季结束以后，<unbreak>11</unbreak>号还打不打比赛。听说他的合同被卡了，不能上场不说，连转会也转不出去。没办法，算他倒霉，谁叫他签的是苏乐达队呢？
t_en: Well... I wonder what's up with No. <unbreak>11</unbreak> for next season. I heard his contract is all tangled up, leaving him unable to play or secure a transfer. What a shame, but it's his own fault for signing with SoulGlad.

t_ch: 我要去论坛发帖，逼他们换掉主教练，再踢掉那几个老东西，高价引入外援，组建新的宇宙战舰！这才叫未来可期！
t_en: I'll post on the forum and demand a change in the management. Those old geezers need to hit the road and bring in some fresh blood to create a new Space Powerhouse! That's how you make a real impact!

t_ch: 嗯？这论坛注册怎么还要答题的…你知道吗，机动球竞赛的犯规动作？
t_en: Hmm? I need to answer questions before signing up for this forum?... "Do you know about the foul play in Roboball?"

t_ch: 我不懂球。
t_en: I know nothing about Roboball.

t_ch: 啧，原来你也不懂。不说了，我得找个真正玩过机动球的人来帮忙……
t_en: Tsk, so you're clueless, too. Well, guess I'll need to find someone who has actually played Roboball to give me a hand...

t_ch: 闹了半天，你连规则都不懂？
t_en: Hold up, you don't even know the rules?

t_ch: …谁说必须懂规则才能看比赛的？狭隘！
t_en: ...Who says you must know the rules to enjoy the game? So narrow-minded!

t_ch: 还有其他想说的吗？
t_en: Anything else you'd like to add?

t_ch: 不说了，我得找个真正懂的人来帮忙……
t_en: No, guess I'll need to find someone who knows Roboball to give me a hand...

t_ch: 我还有事，先走了。
t_en: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

t_ch: 嗯嗯…走吧走吧，我也得去忙了……
t_en: Alright... time to get busy myself...

t_ch: 您好，我是酒店的安保负责人，「猎犬」家系的科蒂。有什么需要帮忙的吗？
t_en: Greetings, I'm Coty of the Bloodhound Family, the head of security for this hotel. How can I assist you?

t_ch: 你能提供什么帮助？
t_en: How can you help me?

t_ch: 如果您与其他宾客或是酒店工作人员发生纠纷，可以随时呼叫我。
t_en: If you have any disputes with other guests or hotel staff, please feel free to contact me at any time.

t_ch: 如果您或同伴遭遇任何危险情况，请及时联系我或者附近的猎犬。
t_en: If you or your companions find yourselves in a dangerous situation, please reach out to me or any nearby Bloodhounds.

t_ch: 另外…在梦境中，剧烈的情绪波动可能会导致一些预料之外的情况，如果您无法有效管理自己的情绪，也可以向我们寻求帮助。
t_en: Additionally... in the Dreamscape, intense emotional fluctuations can lead to unexpected circumstances. If you have trouble managing your emotions effectively, you can also seek assistance from us.

t_ch: 只需通过「梦境护照」提交申请，我们就会为您妥善处理好一切。
t_en: Simply submit a request using your Dreamscape Pass, and we will handle everything for you.

t_ch: 梦里有什么要注意的？
t_en: Is there anything I should pay attention to in the Dreamscape?

t_ch: 嗯…您在梦境中的初始形象将与您入梦时状态相同，所以请确保自身穿戴齐整。
t_en: Well... your default appearance in the Dreamscape is based on how you were when you entered the dream, so please ensure you are properly dressed.

t_ch: 以及，请勿在梦中剽窃他人身份、窥探他人隐私。家族将对此类行为做出精准且严厉的打击。
t_en: Please do not impersonate others or invade their privacy in the Dreamscape. The Family takes strict actions against such violations.

t_ch: 另外，正在维护或修缮中的梦境相对不稳定，为了您的安全，请勿靠近此类区域。
t_en: In addition, areas undergoing maintenance or repair tend to be unstable. For your safety, please avoid approaching such areas.

t_ch: 呃…没什么想问的了。
t_en: Uh... I don't have any more questions.

t_ch: 嗯，有困难就来找我。
t_en: Please feel free to contact me if you encounter any trouble.

t_ch: 愿您在匹诺康尼度过一段愉快的时光。
t_en: I hope that you have a pleasant time in Penacony.

t_ch: 需要帮助吗？
t_en: Do you need any help?

t_ch: 可以聊聊吗？
t_en: Are you up for a chat?

t_ch: …通常而言，我的工作内容不包括陪宾客聊天。但「家族」通常而言不会拒绝宾客的合理请求。说吧，您想聊什么？
t_en: ...Generally, my duties don't involve chatting with guests, but The Family won't decline reasonable requests. So, what would you like to discuss?

t_ch: 「猎犬」家系是什么？
t_en: What is the Bloodhound Family?

t_ch: 在家族的统辖下，匹诺康尼由<color=#dbc291ff>橡木、苜蓿草、隐夜鸫、猎犬和鸢尾花</color>五大家系共同管理。
t_en: Within The Family, Penacony is governed by five major lineages: <color=#dbc291ff>Oak, Alfalfa, Nightingale, Bloodhound, and Iris.</color>

t_ch: 其中猎犬家系主要负责安保工作，匹诺康尼的警卫、消防员、安保等职位都由该家系成员担任。
t_en: The Bloodhound Family is responsible for security-related positions in Penacony, including roles such as guards, firefighters, and hotel security personnel.

t_ch: 我们不仅负责守卫现实中的酒店，还肩负着守护梦境的职责——致力于对抗噩梦、清理梦中的怪物，以保证来客的安全，维护匹诺康尼的和谐与稳定。
t_en: Our primary duty is to ensure the safety of the hotel and its guests in both reality and the Dreamscape. In the Dreamscape, we fight nightmares and eliminate monsters, ensuring the safety of our guests and maintaining order in Penacony.

t_ch: 你能提供什么帮助？
t_en: How can you help me?

t_ch: 如果您与其他宾客或是酒店工作人员发生纠纷，可以随时呼叫我。
t_en: If you have any disputes with other guests or hotel staff, please feel free to contact me at any time.

t_ch: 如果您或同伴遭遇任何危险情况，请及时联系我或者附近的猎犬。
t_en: If you or your companions find yourselves in a dangerous situation, please reach out to me or any nearby Bloodhounds.

t_ch: 另外…在梦境中，剧烈的情绪波动可能会导致一些预料之外的情况，如果您无法有效管理自己的情绪，也可以向我们寻求帮助。
t_en: Additionally... in the Dreamscape, intense emotional fluctuations can lead to unexpected circumstances. If you have trouble managing your emotions effectively, you can also seek assistance from us.

t_ch: 只需通过「梦境护照」提交申请，我们就会为您妥善处理好一切。
t_en: Simply submit a request using your Dreamscape Pass, and we will handle everything for you.

t_ch: 梦里有什么要注意的？
t_en: Is there anything I should pay attention to in the Dreamscape?

t_ch: 嗯…您在梦境中的初始形象将与您入梦时状态相同，所以请确保自身穿戴齐整。
t_en: Well... your default appearance in the Dreamscape is based on how you were when you entered the dream, so please ensure you are properly dressed.

t_ch: 以及，请勿在梦中剽窃他人身份、窥探他人隐私。家族将对此类行为做出精准且严厉的打击。
t_en: Please do not impersonate others or invade their privacy in the Dreamscape. The Family takes strict actions against such violations.

t_ch: 另外，正在维护或修缮中的梦境相对不稳定，为了您的安全，请勿靠近该类区域。
t_en: In addition, areas undergoing maintenance or repair tend to be unstable. For your safety, please avoid approaching such areas.

t_ch: 还想聊聊其他的…
t_en: I'd like to talk about something else...

t_ch: 你问吧，不过快点，我待会还要去巡查。
t_en: Go ahead, but please make it quick as I still have patrol tasks.

t_ch: 聊聊同事？
t_en: How about your colleagues?

t_ch: …既然他们能在这里工作，能力素质自然不会差。
t_en: ...All of them possess the necessary skills to fulfill their roles effectively.

t_ch: 大家各司其职，我也没兴趣在背后对谁说长道短。
t_en: We all focus on our respective jobs. Gossiping about others behind their backs is not something I engage in.

t_ch: 聊聊客人。
t_en: How about the guests?

t_ch: 白日梦酒店人流量巨大，到访的客人自然也是五花八门。与我而言，印象深刻的就只有那些不守规矩的逐梦客。
t_en: The Reverie attracts a diverse range of guests. I must admit that the most memorable ones are Dreamchasers who cause trouble in the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 拖欠房费的、非法偷渡的、诈骗碰瓷的、打架斗殴的……
t_en: For example, those who fail to pay their room charges, who illegally enter Dreamscape, or who engage in scams or disruptive behavior...

t_ch: 您如果对这些话题感兴趣，我们倒是可以找个时间慢慢聊聊…当然，要等我下班以后。
t_en: If you are interested in such topics, we can talk about them sometime, but perhaps after my work hours.

t_ch: 先说到这吧。
t_en: That's all for now.

t_ch: 好，正好我也该去巡查了。
t_en: Well, it's about time for me to start my patrol.

t_ch: 没什么想问的了。
t_en: I have nothing else to ask.

t_ch: 嗯，如果遇上任何困难，请及时联系「猎犬」。
t_en: If you need any assistance, please don't hesitate to contact us Bloodhounds.

t_ch: 下次有机会再聊吧。
t_en: Catch you again next time.

t_ch: 愿您在匹诺康尼度过一段愉快的时光。
t_en: I hope that you have a pleasant time in Penacony.

t_ch: 客人您好，我是酒店的大堂经理丹尼斯。
t_en: Greetings, esteemed guest. I'm Dennis, the lobby manager of this hotel.

t_ch: 很高兴能够在此与您相遇，请问有什么可以为您效劳的吗？
t_en: It's a pleasure to meet you. How can I assist you today?

t_ch: 你能提供什么服务？
t_en: What services do you provide?

t_ch: 作为一名大堂经理，时刻关注客人们的需求、为大家排忧解难就是我的天职。
t_en: As the lobby manager, it's my responsibility to attend to the guests' needs and help them resolve their issues.

t_ch: 您初来乍到，想必对于酒店还不太熟悉吧？那么请让我为您提供一些小小的建议吧——
t_en: Since you are new here, I assume you are not familiar with the hotel. Please allow me to offer some suggestions.

t_ch: 若要办理客房相关手续，既可以选择前台的人工服务，也可以使用大堂的终端自助。
t_en: If you need assistance with room-related services, please choose either the manual service at the receptionist desk or the self-service terminal in the lobby.

t_ch: 如果您对「入梦」相关问题抱有任何疑问，请咨询入梦护理师总管乔凡娜。
t_en: For questions about entering the dream, please feel free to ask Giovanna, the Chief Dream Nurse.

t_ch: 若与其他宾客或酒店服务人员发生纠纷，您可向安保负责人科蒂寻求帮助。
t_en: In case of disputes with other guests or hotel staff, please seek assistance from Coty, the Head of Security.

t_ch: 使用大堂中公用的「梦境电话」，您无需入梦就可以与各个时刻快速联系。
t_en: The public dreamphone in the lobby allows you to make a quick call to any "moment" without entering the Dreamscape.

t_ch: 非常感谢。
t_en: Much obliged.

t_ch: 您客气了，这是我应该做的。
t_en: You're welcome. I'm just doing my job.

t_ch: …再说一遍？
t_en: ...Could you go over it again?

t_ch: 总而言之，如果想要了解更多详细内容，请善用您的「梦境护照」。
t_en: If you need more details, please make good use of your Dreamscape Pass.

t_ch: 愿您在这「美梦之城」玩得开心、玩得尽兴。
t_en: May you have fun and enjoy your stay in the City of Dreams.

t_ch: 客人您好，请问有什么可以为您效劳的吗？
t_en: Greetings, esteemed guest. How may I assist you today?

t_ch: 你能提供什么服务？
t_en: What services do you provide?

t_ch: 作为一名大堂经理，时刻关注客人们的需求、为大家排忧解难就是我的天职。
t_en: As the lobby manager, it's my responsibility to attend to the guests' needs and help them resolve their issues.

t_ch: 如果您有任何想要了解的问题，随时都可以向我咨询。
t_en: If you have any questions, please feel free to ask me.

t_ch: 另外…一个小小的建议——请善用「梦境护照」，它将彻底改变您在匹诺康尼的游梦体验。
t_en: Also... Here's a small pro-tip: Make the most of your Dreamscape Pass, as it will greatly enrich your dream experience in Penacony.

t_ch: 我怎么看你有点眼熟？
t_en: Why do you look a bit familiar to me?

t_ch: …哈哈，有吗？那我可能恰巧和您的某位朋友长得像。
t_en: ...Haha, is that so? Perhaps I happen to look like one of your friends.

t_ch: 似乎是在梦境里…
t_en: I think we met somewhere in the Dreamscape...

t_ch: 停！不用再说了，这位客人，我已经充分了解您的意思了……
t_en: Please stop! I believe I fully understand what you mean, esteemed guest...

t_ch: 就好比您在星际网络上认识一位朋友，也没必要真的飞到那人的星球去看个究竟，是不是？
t_en: For example, when you meet someone online through the Interastral network, it doesn't necessarily mean you'll physically travel to their planet to check it out. Don't you agree?

t_ch: 说起来…我最近总听到有来宾抱怨梦里的代币不够花，根本玩不尽兴。那么…请拿好，这是我个人为您准备的小小心意。
t_en: By the way... I've been receiving complaints from guests about not having enough tokens to fully enjoy their dreams. In this case... I've personally prepared a small gift for you.

t_ch: 作为我们之间「友谊」的见证，之后我每周都会为您准备<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>10</unbreak>枚「艾迪恩代币」</color>。
t_en: As a token of our "friendship," I will provide you with <color=#f29e38ff>ten Aideen Tokens</color> every week.

t_ch: 不过这种事情你知我知就够了——您应该理解吧？切勿声张。
t_en: But let's keep it just between us. You understand what I mean, right?

t_ch: 丹尼斯狡黠地朝你眨了一下眼。
t_en: Dennis winks at you astutely.

t_ch: 让我看看你的货。
t_en: Let me see what you have for sale.

t_ch: 丹尼斯狡黠地朝你眨了一下眼。
t_en: Dennis winks at you astutely.

t_ch: 没什么事了。
t_en: Nothing else.

t_ch: 好的，如有任何问题，我随时为您效劳。
t_en: Certainly. I'm always at your service.

t_ch: 愿您在这「美梦之城」玩得开心、玩得尽兴。
t_en: May you have fun and enjoy your stay in the City of Dreams.

t_ch: 啊，是那个能找出我的人！
t_en: Oh, the perceptive individual who found me!

t_ch: 我有话和你说。
t_en: I have something for you.

t_ch: 你真的是个皮皮西吗？
t_en: Are you really a Pepeshi?

t_ch: 当然不是啦，我是来自凯尔萨斯星的红泥粘土人，这幅样貌是我的拟态。
t_en: No, of course not. I'm a Red Clayform from Kalsas, and this form is a result of my mimicry.

t_ch: 我怕原本的长相吓到大家，就根据皮皮西人的外貌调整了形态——据说他们在宇宙中超受欢迎。
t_en: I was worried that my true appearance might frighten everyone, so I changed my form and became a Pepeshi. I heard they're super popular in the universe.

t_ch: 难道你觉得…我看起来不可爱吗？
t_en: Don't you think... I look cute?

t_ch: 可爱。
t_en: You are cute.

t_ch: 嘿嘿…我花了很大功夫才捏出来的。你喜欢就好~
t_en: Heehee... it took me quite some time. I'm glad you find it appealing!

t_ch: 不可爱。
t_en: Not cute.

t_ch: 唔，你的审美怎么和别人不一样啊！大家明明都很喜欢的……
t_en: Huh... your taste is so different from the others! Everyone else seems to think it's cute...

t_ch: 总之，我在外人面前只会保持这副形态。你就当我是个皮皮西好了。
t_en: Anyway, I'll stick with this form in front of others. Just treat me as a Pepeshi.

t_ch: 你是怎么拿到邀请函的？
t_en: How did you get an invitation?

t_ch: 嘿嘿，别看我这样，在母星也是数一数二的人才呢~
t_en: Heehee, maybe you don't know, but I'm one of the most talented individuals on my home planet!

t_ch: 想当年， 我可是第一个乘坐动力炮椅飞上天空、然后又安全着陆的家伙。公司的高个子都说我是航天英雄。
t_en: I was the first to fly in a Kinetic Propulsion Chair and land safely. The tall guys in IPC even call me a space hero!

t_ch: 动力炮椅？
t_en: A Kinetic Propulsion Chair?

t_ch: 之前我们粘土人必须依靠公司才能完成星际旅行，每次光是甲板的清洁费就要花掉不少信用点。
t_en: We Clayforms needed IPC services for interstellar travel, and it cost us a significant amount of credits just to clean the decks.

t_ch: 于是我和几个小伙伴一起，研发出了粘土人专用的太空旅行方式——动力炮椅。
t_en: So, my friends and I developed the Kinetic Propulsion Chair, a special way for us Clayforms to travel through space.

t_ch: 只要把几台「一次性动力炮」绑在椅子上同时开火，就能得到足够的动力、一下子冲出星球了。
t_en: Just attach several Disposable Kinetic Cannons to a chair and fire them all at once, and you'll get enough power to launch yourself from the planet.

t_ch: 可惜那次我绑的炮管数量不够多，只飞到云端就落下来了。
t_en: Well, in my case, I didn't attach enough cannons that time, so I only made it up to the clouds before falling back down.

t_ch: 安全着陆？
t_en: Did you land safely?

t_ch: 嘿嘿，这可就有说头了……
t_en: Heehee, that's an interesting story...

t_ch: 虽然粘土人也要靠双脚行走，但我们的身体可塑性其实非常强，什么形状都能变。
t_en: While we Clayforms walk on two feet, our bodies can actually stretch and take on any shape.

t_ch: 飞上高空之后，我便将身体伸展成饼状，增大阻力、减少速度，最后安全落回地面。
t_en: When I was up in the air, I stretched myself into a pancake-like form to catch more air and eventually safely landed on the ground.

t_ch: 听公司的高个子说，这和你们的什么「降落伞」原理一致。不过我只凭身体就能做到，厉害吧？
t_en: The tall guys in IPC mentioned that it's akin to your "parachute," and I can do it with my body. Pretty impressive, right?

t_ch: 你们不会溶化吗？
t_en: Don't you dissolve in water?

t_ch: 唔…泥人遇水肯定会化啊。所以一直以来，雨季都是凯尔萨斯星上最大的危险。
t_en: Well... we do dissolve upon contact with water. That's why the rainy season has always been the greatest hazard on Kalsas.

t_ch: 幸好公司认可我们的价值，在星球表面建起了许多避雨场所。现在基本没人会消失在雨中了。
t_en: Fortunately, IPC has recognized our value and constructed rain shelters on the planet. As a result, disappearances during rainfall are now few and far between.

t_ch: 不过，去其他星球的时候还是得多加小心——千万别走到浴室里。
t_en: Still, we must be careful when visiting other planets and never enter a bathroom.

t_ch: 再玩一次捉迷藏吧。
t_en: Let's play hide-and-seek again.

t_ch: 哼哼，等着瞧吧，这次我可不会再输了！
t_en: Sure, just wait and see. I won't lose this time!

t_ch: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
t_en: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

t_ch: 绒球吗？虽然不知道你在想什么，但要摸就摸好了。
t_en: Fluff ball? I'm not sure what you have in mind, but go ahead and touch it if you really want to.

t_ch: 你用手抚摸着杰诺的绒球。对方没有任何抵抗，就像一只享受服侍的小猫……
t_en: You run your hand over Jno's fluff ball. Jno enjoys it, much like a happy kitten getting some pets...

t_ch: 唔，这是什么？好微妙的感觉……
t_en: Hmm... what is this? It feels so unusual...

t_ch: 皮皮西几乎不会允许别人摸自己的绒球——谁又敢让街上的陌生人帮自己掏耳朵呢？不过杰诺并不是真正的皮皮西。
t_en: Pepeshi rarely allows anyone to touch their fluff ball, just like how a human wouldn't let a stranger pick their ear. However, Jno is not a real Pepeshi.

t_ch: 继续继续，不要停~
t_en: Keep doing that. Don't stop...

t_ch: 皮皮西一般不会让别人摸球。
t_en: Pepeshi rarely allows others to touch their fluff ball.

t_ch: 唉？这、这样吗？看来我还有很多要学啊……
t_en: Oh? I—Is that so? I suppose I still have much to learn...

t_ch: 继续摸摸。
t_en: Keep petting it.

t_ch: 呼噜噜噜噜噜~
t_en: Purrrrrrr...

t_ch: 杰诺抬起头，发出了舒服的声音，就像一只宠物猫。
t_en: Jno lifts the head and purrs contentedly, like a cat getting a good scratch.

t_ch: 再摸摸我吧？
t_en: Would you pet me again?

t_ch: 皮皮西一般不会让别人摸球。
t_en: Pepeshi rarely allows others to touch their fluff ball.

t_ch: 这、这样吗？那你刚才……
t_en: I—Is that so? But you just...

t_ch: 唔，算了。反正我也不是真的皮皮西。看来还有很多要学啊……
t_en: Well, forget it. I'm not a real Pepeshi anyway. I suppose I still have much to learn...

t_ch: 再摸摸。
t_en: Pet Jno again.

t_ch: 那团绒球随着你指尖的动作摆动，仿佛要维持不住固态……
t_en: The fluff ball wobbles as your fingertips move, almost as if it is going to lose its solid form...

t_ch: 好舒服，就像在泥塘里打滚……
t_en: So comforting... like rolling around in a muddy pond...

t_ch: 皮皮西开始分泌出奇怪的汗水……
t_en: The "Pepeshi" starts to secrete an unusual sweat...

t_ch: 这些粘稠的液体顺着身体表面滴落，最后汇聚成块状的凝胶…从外形上看，是崭新出厂的散热凝胶。
t_en: Sticky fluids trickle down Jno's body and form gel-like clumps... From the looks of it, it is the latest cooling gel.

t_ch: 刚才那是什么？
t_en: What was that just now?

t_ch: 送你了！
t_en: You can have it!

t_ch: 唔…上次发生了那样的事，怪不好意思的。算了吧~
t_en: Well... I feel a bit embarrassed after what happened last time. Let's forget it...

t_ch: 再见。
t_en: Thank you.

t_ch: 唔，下次记得陪我玩啊。
t_en: Well, come and play with me next time.

t_ch: 欢迎光临梦境贩售店，爱德华医生竭诚为您服务！
t_en: Welcome to Dreamscape Sales Store! Dr. Edward at your service!

t_ch: 此时此刻，您想体验一个什么滋味的梦境？
t_en: What kind of a dream would you like to experience now?

t_ch: 看看你都卖些什么。
t_en: Let's see what you have.

t_ch: 当然，请随意挑选！
t_en: Certainly. Please feel free to browse!

t_ch: 能跟你聊会儿天吗？
t_en: Can we talk for a while?

t_ch: 当然可以，陪宾客聊天也在梦境贩售店的业务范围之内！
t_en: Certainly. Engaging in conversation with guests is within the scope of our services!

t_ch: 你为什么叫爱德华医生？
t_en: Why does everyone call you "Dr. Edward"?

t_ch: 为什么？因为这是妈妈给我取的名字！
t_en: Why? Because it's the name given by my mother!

t_ch: 开个玩笑，您别当真。光是看看也知道，我可是这家梦境贩售店的化身，怎么可能会有血脉亲人？哈哈……
t_en: Well, just kidding. I'm the embodiment of this Dreamscape Sales Store, and it's impossible for me to have any blood relatives. Haha...

t_ch: 回答您的问题，这个名字是很久之前的一位鸢尾花家系的家主为我起的。据说那位家主非常喜欢电影，「爱德华医生」是他喜欢的电影里的主要角色。
t_en: About your question, this name was given to me by a certain leader of the Iris Family long ago. He had a great love for movies, and "Dr. Edward" was a prominent character in his favorite film.

t_ch: 遗憾的是，我从来没看过那部电影——毕竟我每天都要阅览成千上万个梦境，那可比看电影带劲多了！
t_en: Unfortunately, I've never seen that movie myself. After all, I need to view thousands of dreams every day, and it's much more entertaining than watching movies!

t_ch: 你对「钟表匠」了解多少？
t_en: What do you know about the Watchmaker?

t_ch: 啊，伟大的钟表匠…多少人为了追逐他的步伐来到这华美的梦想之城！
t_en: Ah, the illustrious Watchmaker... Many people have come to this splendid City of Dreams, aspiring to follow in his footsteps!

t_ch: 很遗憾，我对那位大人物的真实生平知之甚少。但有关他的传说和梦境，我这里可是有不少存货！
t_en: Unfortunately, I don't know much about this great man, but I do have an extensive collection of his legends and dreams!

t_ch: 恰巧您今天赶上了梦境贩售店的特别酬宾优惠，只要<unbreak>5600</unbreak>万苜蓿币，您就可以带走由爱德华医生亲自整理剪辑的「钟表匠传说」梦境全集！
t_en: By the way, there is a special offer available today. For only <unbreak>56</unbreak> million Alfalfa credits, you can get the entire compilation of "Legends of the Watchmaker" dreams, meticulously edited by Dr. Edward himself!

t_ch: 他们说的「谐乐大典」是什么？
t_en: What is the Charmony Festival?

t_ch: 您不知道吗？「谐乐大典」是家族每个琥珀纪都要举办的盛大庆典，届时，寰宇间的诸多明星将齐聚一堂，为赞颂{RUBY_B#希佩}神主{RUBY_E#}开嗓！
t_en: You don't know about it? The Charmony Festival is a grand carnival held by The Family in each Amber Era. It brings together numerous stars of the universe to herald {RUBY_B#Xipe}the Great One{RUBY_E#}!

t_ch: 据说这一次的谐乐大典，享誉银河的知更鸟小姐也会为匹诺康尼十二时分的所有宾客献上歌喉…令人期待！
t_en: Rumor has it that during the Charmony Festival, the renowned Robin will grace all the Twelve Hours of Penacony with her enchanting voice... What an extraordinary fest!

t_ch: 顺带一提，您只需要花上<unbreak>3600</unbreak>万苜蓿币，就可以从我这里买到收录了过去五届「谐乐大典」的终极梦境合辑哦？
t_en: By the way, I have prepared the ultimate dream collection for the previous five Charmony Festivals. They are for <unbreak>36</unbreak> million Alfalfa credits only!

t_ch: 你这里的梦都是哪来的？
t_en: Where did you get your dreams?

t_ch: 您真是一位好奇心旺盛的客人！我猜如果这是一家现实中的餐厅，您也会对他们的食材供应链感兴趣，对吧？
t_en: You are quite a curious customer! If this were a restaurant in reality, you'd probably inquire about their supply chain, right?

t_ch: 只是开个玩笑，没有挖苦您的意思。对于这些信息，我向来开诚布公！
t_en: Just kidding. Well, I'm always open and honest about this aspect!

t_ch: 首先声明，在我这里出售的梦境，百分之百都经过了梦境主人的授权——当然，不包含那些年代过于古早、或梦境主人早已逝世的存货。
t_en: First and foremost, all the dreams available here have been authorized by their owners, except for cases where the dreams are too old or the owners have passed away.

t_ch: 至于获取梦境的途经，绝大多数都来自客人的主动贡献。熟悉「黄金的时刻」的宾客都知道，爱德华医生会以公道的价格回收有趣的梦境！
t_en: Most of the dreams come from voluntary contributions by guests. Guests familiar with the Golden Hour know well that Dr. Edward acquires interesting dreams at a fair price!

t_ch: 另外，还有少数比较特别的梦境…哦，糟糕，差点忘记——这部分是秘密！就像一些高级餐厅的私藏菜单一样，不能随便透露！
t_en: In addition, there are a few more unique dreams... Oops, I almost forgot, that part is a secret! Like the private menus in restaurants, they are exclusive to certain guests!

t_ch: 总而言之，如果您想靠讲故事来获取一份可观的收入，随时欢迎来给爱德华医生讲讲您经历过的梦境！
t_en: So, if you're interested in sharing your dreams and making a profit, feel free to come here to talk to Dr. Edward about your dreams!

t_ch: 没什么要聊的了。
t_en: That's all for now.

t_ch: 这就急着走了吗？不再看看店里的存货了？
t_en: Are you leaving now? Maybe you'd like to explore what's in the store?

t_ch: 好吧，期待您的下次光顾！记住，爱德华医生比您更了解您内心的喜好！
t_en: Well, I'll look forward to your next visit! Remember, Dr. Edward knows more about your preferences than you do!

t_ch: 我有些梦想推销给你。
t_en: I have some dreams to share with you.

t_ch: 哦？如果是非常有趣的梦，我愿意高价回收。
t_en: Oh? Then I'm willing to offer a good price if they are particularly interesting.

t_ch: 给他讲和贝洛伯格相关的梦。
t_en: Share your dreams about Belobog.

t_ch: 你开始给爱德华医生讲述你的狂野梦境。
t_en: You start describing your wild dream to Dr. Edward.

t_ch: 在这个梦里，漆黑王虎克当上了贝洛伯格的大守护者；离开雅利洛-Ⅵ千年之久的反物质军团卷土重来，准备完成他们此前未能完成的任务。
t_en: In your dream, Hook, the Pitch-Dark Lord, becomes the Supreme Guardian of Belobog. The Antimatter Legion, absent from Jarilo-VI for a thousand years, makes a comeback, intending to fulfill their unfinished mission.

t_ch: 一位强大的绝灭大君带领着军团的先遣队迫临，黑云笼罩了整个星球，贝洛伯格的民众绝望地等待着末日降临……
t_en: The invasion is led by a powerful Lord Ravager, engulfing the entire planet in dark clouds and despair. The people of Belobog await their impending doom...

t_ch: …但末日没有降临！伟大的漆黑王虎克驾驶着经过上百番改造的「帝皇造物引擎」，乘着撕裂黑云的耀眼光芒，骤然出现在了克里珀堡的上空！
t_en: ...But the doom never comes! The almighty Hook, the Pitch-Dark Lord, pilots the Imperial Engine of Creation that underwent hundreds of modifications, appearing in the sky above Qlipoth Fort, emitting a dazzling light that pierces through the dark clouds!

t_ch: 帝皇造物引擎挥舞着同样已经完全进化的洞洞机•神王模式，只用一击便击碎了绝灭大君的装甲——贝洛伯格的人民，从此自由了！
t_en: The Imperial Engine of Creation wields the fully evolved Diggertron in God-Emperor Mode, shattering Lord Ravager's armor with a single strike and liberating the people of Belobog from the clutches of terror!

t_ch: …真是个精彩的梦境！我愿意从您这里买入！
t_en: ...What an outstanding dream! I'd love to purchase it!

t_ch: 这些{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}请您收下吧。您的贡献一定会给其他宾客带来无限的快乐！
t_en: Please accept these {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}. Your contribution will undoubtedly bring immense joy to other guests!

t_ch: 给他讲和仙舟相关的梦。
t_en: Share your dreams about the Xianzhou ship.

t_ch: 你开始给爱德华医生讲述你的浪漫梦境。
t_en: You start describing your romantic dream to Dr. Edward.

t_ch: 在这个梦里，你是一位出身曜青的仙舟剑客——年少成名、本领高强的你打算离开师门，赶往罗浮争夺剑首之名。
t_en: In your dream, you assume the role of a sword master from the Xianzhou ship Yaoqing. Young, famous, and skilled, you intend to leave your school and head to the Luofu to compete for the coveted title of Sword Champion.

t_ch: 然而动身当天，你那年刚过百的狐人小师妹却缠住了你，教你放弃好勇斗狠的念头，陪她一起偷偷逃离仙舟、去到那星间流浪。
t_en: However, on the day of your planned departure, your junior foxian soror, who is just over a hundred years old, dissuades you from pursuing the title. She persuades you to secretly escape from the Xianzhou ship, embarking on a stellar voyage together.

t_ch: 洞天港口前，师妹的纤纤玉指抵住你挂在腰间的剑鞘，另一只手撩拨着你耳后的发丝，眼角已然兜不住的那两颗珍珠泪眼看就要掉落下来。
t_en: As you both stand at the starport, she tenderly touches the scabbard hanging from your waist. Her other hand gently tucks a strand of hair behind your ear, while tears shimmer in the corners of her eyes.

t_ch: 「师兄，狐人这一生不过短短三百余载…相比那浮华缥缈的剑首名号，你可愿意先陪我走完这转瞬如烟的一辈子？」
t_en: "Senior frater, the life of a foxian is a fleeting three hundred years... Are you willing to forsake the empty title of 'Sword Champion' and accompany me for the remainder of my fleeting existence?"

t_ch: 你再也拦不住自胸口上涌的热流，一把揽过师妹的肩膀，嘴唇贴在她耳边说道……
t_en: A profound warmth fills your being. You tightly grasp her shoulders, drawing nearer, and softly whisper into her ear...

t_ch: …停！请您打住，停在这里就刚刚好！
t_en: ...Stop! Please just stop right there!

t_ch: 可我还没说完。
t_en: But I'm not finished yet.

t_ch: 这才刚到高潮部分…
t_en: The story is reaching its climactic part...

t_ch: 这就对了——您可能不知道，现在的客人最喜欢的就是「开放式结局」！
t_en: Exactly! You might not be fully aware, but open-ended endings have gained popularity among guests these days.

t_ch: 我确信您的梦一定有个非常棒的结尾，但相信我，这样断章可以最大化它的…呃…市场效益！
t_en: While I'm certain your dream has a remarkable ending, stopping it at this juncture can optimize its... well... market appeal!

t_ch: 这些{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}请您收下吧。您的贡献一定会给其他宾客带来无限的快乐！
t_en: Please accept these {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}. Your contribution will undoubtedly bring immense joy to other guests!

t_ch: 给他讲和星核猎手相关的梦。
t_en: Share your dreams about the Stellaron Hunter.

t_ch: 你开始给爱德华医生讲述你的神奇梦境。
t_en: You start describing your wondrous dream to Dr. Edward.

t_ch: 在这个梦里，你是某个普通星球上的某个普通国家里的某个普通城市里的某个普通小学生。
t_en: In this dream, you assume the role of an ordinary elementary school student, residing in an ordinary city of an ordinary country on an ordinary planet.

t_ch: 顺带一提，这可能是你做过的最离奇的梦之一，因为你根本不知道正经的学校长什么样。
t_en: Interestingly, this dream is one of the most peculiar ones you have ever had, as you have no concept of what a typical school is like.

t_ch: 你有一个矮个子女同桌，名字叫银狼。在你印象中，她上课时总是偷偷在课桌下打游戏，但即使如此她的成绩仍然很好。
t_en: You have a short female classmate named Silver Wolf. From what you recall, she often plays games under her desk during class, yet manages to maintain good grades.

t_ch: 班上有个出名的打架王，名字叫刃。他平时不爱说话，但不论多凶狠的校园恶霸碰到他都只敢绕道。他经常不交作业，考试也经常挂零，但没有老师愿意管他。
t_en: There is a bad boy named Blade in your class. He is usually quiet, but even the worst bullies are afraid to mess with him. Although he frequently neglects homework and fails exams, no teacher dares to reprimand him.

t_ch: 班长名叫卡芙卡，她简直是完美的符号：无论是外表、成绩还是人格魅力，她在所有你能想到的方面都是满分。但不知怎的，你总感觉她的内心其实藏着十分阴暗的一面。
t_en: The class president, Kafka, is a symbol of perfection in every aspect, be it her looks, grades, or charisma. However, you always have a hunch that she conceals a dark side.

t_ch: 溜号同桌、打架王和班长这三个性格迥异的人居然是好朋友，换做任何人都难以想象。有一天放学之后，他们三个围到了你的课桌前——
t_en: To everyone's surprise, these three individuals with such contrasting personalities are actually close friends. One day, after school, the three of them gather around your desk...

t_ch: …请允许我打断您一下，{F#女士}{M#先生}，但您的梦境中似乎出现了几个被列入星际通缉名单的危险人物。
t_en: ...I apologize for the interruption, {F#miss}{M#sir}, but it appears that some dangerous individuals from the most wanted list have emerged in your dream.

t_ch: 并且，您在梦境中似乎刻意美化了他们的形象——根据规定，梦境贩售店不能回购类似的梦。
t_en: Furthermore, you seem to have intentionally glorified them. Unfortunately, the rules dictate that I'm not allowed to purchase such dreams.

t_ch: 您要是不介意的话，欢迎换个梦再给我讲讲！
t_en: Please feel free to share more of your dreams!

t_ch: 下次再来。
t_en: Perhaps next time.

t_ch: 这就急着走了吗？不再看看店里的存货了？
t_en: Are you leaving now? Maybe you'd like to explore what's in the store?

t_ch: 好吧，期待您的下次光顾！记住，爱德华医生比您更了解您内心的喜好！
t_en: Well, I'll look forward to your next visit! Remember, Dr. Edward knows more about your preferences than you do!

t_ch: 一台设计十分荒诞的电话机被固定在这里，等待路过的好奇宾客拿起它的听筒。
t_en: A peculiarly designed telephone is fixed in place, waiting for curious passersby to pick up its receiver.

t_ch: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
t_en: *ring*... *ring*!

t_ch: 晚上好，尊贵的客人！您今天是否有兴趣打一通神奇的「窥梦电话」？
t_en: Good evening, esteemed guest! Would you be interested in making a Dreampeek Call today?

t_ch: 「窥梦电话」是什么？
t_en: What is a "Dreampeek Call"?

t_ch: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
t_en: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

t_ch: 只要您投入一点点{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}，窥梦电话就能自动检索你的通讯录，找到您正在熟睡的某位朋友——
t_en: Just insert a small amount of {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}, and the phone will automatically search your contacts for a sleeping friend and allow you to listen to their dreams...

t_ch: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
t_en: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

t_ch: 听着不太…道德？
t_en: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

t_ch: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
t_en: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

t_ch: 叮铃铃，「讲道德的匹诺康尼派对客」——我得承认，您的笑话确实很有品！
t_en: *ring* An "ethical partygoer in Penacony"! I must admit that your joke is quite refined!

t_ch: 这下听懂了。
t_en: Now you understand.

t_ch: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
t_en: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

t_ch: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
t_en: *dial tone*

t_ch: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
t_en: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

t_ch: 窥梦电话已拨通——您将会听到：布洛妮娅•兰德的梦境。
t_en: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Bronya Rand's dream.

t_ch: 啊…那样肯定不行……
t_en: Ah... that wouldn't work...

t_ch: 希儿，别……
t_en: Seele, don't...

t_ch: …别用那么大力气！那个箱子里装的都是母亲大人送我的手工艺品，很容易摔碎的。
t_en: ...Don't use so much force! That box contains handicrafts Mother gave me, and they could break easily.

t_ch: 哦，这样啊…那你咋不早说？那行，我就先不动它了，到时候你自己想办法搬……
t_en: I see... Why didn't you mention it earlier? Fine, I'll leave it alone for now, and you'll move it yourself...

t_ch: 剧情没有按照你设想的方向推行下去——你感到既恼火又沮丧，于是挂断了电话。
t_en: The plot takes an unexpected turn, leaving you both irritated and frustrated. You hang up the phone.

t_ch: 叮铃铃——感谢您使用窥梦电话服务！欢迎您下次再来！
t_en: *ring* Thank you for using the Dreampeek Call service! Please come back next time!

t_ch: （屏住呼吸）
t_en: (Holding your breath)

t_ch: 天啊，这是我最喜欢的一集！
t_en: Oh gosh, this is my favorite episode!

t_en: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Silver Wolf's dream.

t_ch: …真是漂亮的一击！不愧是本届大赛的一号种子，银狼选手的霸主以太灵轻松横扫了对手，她又一次轻描淡写地拿下了胜利！
t_en: ...What an impressive strike! As expected of the top seed, Silver Wolf's Overlord Aether Spirit effortlessly overcame her opponent, securing another easy victory!

t_ch: 我宣布，本届「星际决胜庆典」的冠军首席是——银狼！
t_en: I hereby declare... the champion of this year's Interastral Tournament Festival... is Silver Wolf!

t_ch: 从听筒中爆发出震耳欲聋的欢呼声。银狼站在舞台中央享受着这一切，喊出了她的决胜台词——
t_en: You heard thunderous cheers from the receiver. Silver Wolf, standing at the center of the stage and reveling in the moment, shouts her victorious line...

t_ch: <size=28>「以太战线，启动！」</size>
t_en: <size=28>"Aetherium Wars, activate!"</size>

t_ch: …看来银狼还在为之前大赛上的失利耿耿于怀。果然，不氪金就变强是只有梦里才会发生的事。
t_en: ...It appears that Silver Wolf is still frustrated by her loss in the previous tournament. Indeed, a game without any pay-to-win elements is something that only appears in dreams.

t_ch: 咩…咩咩，咩！
t_en: Baa... Baaaaa!

t_ch: 咩咩…咩…咩咩…咩……
t_en: Baaaa... Baa... Baaaa... Baa ......

t_ch: 咩咩？咩！咩咩咩…咩咩、咩咩、咩！
t_en: Baaaa? Baa! Baaaaaa...Baaaa, baaaa, baa!

t_ch: 咩咩——咩、咩、咩！咩咩？！咩咩，咩咩咩咩，咩！！
t_en: Baaaa... Baa, Baa, Baa! Baaaa!? Baa, baaaaaaa, baa!

t_ch: 你心情复杂地挂断了电话——这个结果谁能想到呢？
t_en: You end the call with mixed emotions. Who could have expected such an outcome?

t_ch: 但至少这消除了你内心长久以来的一个迷惑：没错，仿生人偶确实是会梦到电子羊的。
t_en: However, this outcome does resolve a long-standing confusion for you: Androids do dream of electric sheep.

t_en: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Sushang's dream.

t_ch: 好，接下来开始公布这次考试的分数。老规矩，我会按照成绩和名次从低往高报。
t_en: Then we'll announce the scores for this exam. I'll announce the scores and rankings from lowest to highest, as usual.

t_ch: 第三十五名…■■，<unbreak>36</unbreak>分。第三十四名…■■■，<unbreak>41</unbreak>分。第三十三名…■■，<unbreak>43</unbreak>分。
t_en: <unbreak>35</unbreak>th place... ■■■■■, <unbreak>36</unbreak> points. <unbreak>34</unbreak>th place... ■■■■■■■, <unbreak>41</unbreak> points. <unbreak>33</unbreak>rd place... ■■■■■■, <unbreak>43</unbreak> points.

t_ch: …第三名…桂乃芬，<unbreak>94</unbreak>分。第二名…罗刹，<unbreak>96</unbreak>分。第一名…素裳，<unbreak>99</unbreak>分！
t_en: 3rd place... Guinaifen, <unbreak>94</unbreak> points. 2nd place... Luocha, <unbreak>96</unbreak> points. And the winner is... Sushang, <unbreak>99</unbreak> points!

t_ch: ——通话到此戛然而止，你猜是素裳兴奋地从梦中惊醒了。
t_en: ...The call abruptly ends. It seems Sushang has awakened from her dream, filled with excitement.

t_ch: 真不敢想象回到现实的她内心会有多么失落……

t_ch: 空荡的大厅…脚步声接近，带着回声。一人在前，两人在后。
t_en: An empty hall... Footsteps approach, their echoes reverberating. One ahead, two behind.

t_ch: 待会儿，你看清楚这个人。
t_en: Watch this person carefully.

t_ch: 脚步声停了下来，四下一片死寂。
t_en: The footsteps cease, an eerie silence enveloping the surroundings.

t_ch: 你记得我么？
t_en: Do you remember me?

t_ch: 记得。
t_en: I remember.

t_ch: 人有五名，代价有……
t_en: Of five people... must pay the price...

t_ch: …你以闪电般的速度挂断了电话。
t_en: ...You hang up faster than lightning.

t_ch: 「可别*无名客粗话*再来一次了」——你内心如此念叨着。
t_en: You internally think to yourself "Please don't *Nameless profanity* let this happen again!"

t_ch: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
t_en: *dial tone*

t_ch: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
t_en: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

t_ch: 窥梦电话已拨通——您将会听到：银枝的梦境。
t_en: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Argenti's dream.

t_ch: 美丽的伊德莉拉…真善的伊德莉拉……
t_en: O, beautiful Idrila... O, graceful Idrila...

t_ch: 你身在何方，伊德莉拉？
t_en: Where are you, Idrila?

t_ch: 我在宇宙万物之中寻找你的身影，伊德莉拉…一朵花、一条河、一颗星…四处都是你留下的神迹，四处却又不见你的踪影……
t_en: I've been searching for you throughout the universe, Idrila... in flowers, rivers, and stars... Your divine traces are everywhere, yet nowhere could you be found...

t_ch: 伊德莉拉…终有一日我会求得你的瞥视，在我的心脏停止跳——
t_en: Idrila... One day, I will finally bask in your gaze. Before my heart stops beating...

t_ch: …你挂断了电话。你感觉只要再多听到一次「伊德莉拉」这个名字，你的大脑就要红温、乃至爆炸了。
t_en: ...You hang up the phone, feeling overwhelmed. Hearing the name "Idrila" once more may make your brain explode.

t_ch: 叮铃铃——感谢您使用窥梦电话服务！欢迎您下次再来！
t_en: *ring* Thank you for using the Dreampeek Call service! Please come back next time!

t_ch: 一台设计十分荒诞的电话机被固定在这里，等待路过的好奇宾客拿起它的听筒。
t_en: A peculiarly designed telephone is fixed in place, waiting for curious passersby to pick up its receiver.

t_ch: 叮铃铃——叮铃铃！
t_en: *ring*... *ring*!

t_ch: 晚上好，尊贵的客人！您今天是否有兴趣打一通神奇的「窥梦电话」？
t_en: Good evening, esteemed guest! Would you be interested in making a Dreampeek Call today?

t_ch: 「窥梦电话」是什么？
t_en: What is a "Dreampeek Call"?

t_ch: 问得好，问得好！初来乍到的客人，还不知道「窥梦电话」的神奇之处！
t_en: A wonderful question! Please allow me to introduce you to the wonders of the Dreampeek Call, dear new guest!

t_ch: 只要您投入一点点{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}，窥梦电话就能自动检索你的通讯录，找到您正在熟睡的某位朋友——
t_en: Just insert a small amount of {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}, and the phone will automatically search your contacts for a sleeping friend and allow you to listen to their dreams...

t_ch: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
t_en: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

t_ch: 听着不太…道德？
t_en: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

t_ch: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
t_en: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

t_ch: 叮铃铃，「讲道德的匹诺康尼派对客」——我得承认，您的笑话确实很有品！
t_en: *ring* An "ethical partygoer in Penacony"! I must admit that your joke is quite refined!

t_ch: 这下听懂了。
t_en: Now you understand.

t_ch: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
t_en: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

t_ch: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
t_en: *dial tone*

t_ch: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
t_en: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

t_ch: 窥梦电话已拨通——您将会听到：托帕的梦境。
t_en: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Topaz's dream.

t_ch: 叮！您目前已经睡眠1小时<unbreak>25</unbreak>分钟，剩余睡眠时间3小时<unbreak>05</unbreak>分钟。
t_en: Ding! You have slept for 1 hour and <unbreak>25</unbreak> minutes, with 3 hours and 5 minutes remaining.

t_ch: 一四三市场组还差6份调研报告没有提交，已经延期快十天了——得去催催。
t_en: The <unbreak>143</unbreak>rd Marketing Team has 6 research reports overdue by almost ten days. I need to push them.

t_ch: 这个季度的部门差旅经费报表还没核算。我自己弄恐怕来不及了…交给账账吧。
t_en: The departmental expense and travel expenditure reports for this quarter have not been verified. I probably don't have enough time to handle it myself... I'll let Numby do it.

t_ch: 哦对，差点忘了给那三个小宝贝买适合翁瓦克幼蜥的宠物粮！起床就下单。
t_en: Oh, yeah, I almost forgot to buy pet food suited for Vonwacq baby lizards for those three cuties! I'll place the order once I wake up.

t_ch: 叮！您目前已经睡眠1小时<unbreak>26</unbreak>分钟，剩余睡眠时间3小时<unbreak>04</unbreak>分钟。
t_en: Ding! You have slept for 1 hour and <unbreak>26</unbreak> minutes, with 3 hours and 4 minutes remaining.

t_ch: …你挂断了电话，内心感到有些绝望。日理万机的公司高管生活果然离你还是太遥远了。
t_en: ...You hang up, feeling a sense of despair. The life of a senior executive juggling millions of things every day feels too foreign to you.

t_ch: 叮铃铃——感谢您使用窥梦电话服务！欢迎您下次再来！
t_en: *ring* Thank you for using the Dreampeek Call service! Please come back next time!

t_ch: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
t_en: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

t_ch: 嘟…嘟…嘟……
t_en: *dial tone*

t_ch: 叮铃…叮铃…叮铃……
t_en: *ring*... *ring*... *ring*...

t_ch: …非常抱歉，目前没有对象能够接通您的「窥梦来电」。请确保您的通讯录中有至少一位朋友正处在深度睡眠中，然后再试一次。
t_en: ...I'm sorry, but there is currently no one available to connect you to your Dreampeek Call. Please ensure that at least one of your friends in your contacts is in deep sleep and try again.

t_ch: 贵客，欢迎光临。
t_en: Welcome, my esteemed customer.

t_ch: 珠宝，腕表，包袋，高级定制…您可以在这里买到匹诺康尼最高端和最奢侈的商品。
t_en: Jewelry, wristwatches, handbags, and haute couture... You can find the most high-end and opulent merchandise in Penacony here.

t_ch: 有什么推荐的吗？
t_en: Do you have any recommendations?

t_ch: 这些是近期颇受好评的单品，挑出来供您选购。
t_en: These are some of the bestsellers recently, I've picked them out for you to choose from!

t_ch: …我就是到处逛逛。
t_en: ...I'm just window shopping.

t_ch: 不打扰您了，有需要随时喊我就行。
t_en: I won't impose any further, please feel free to reach out to me if you require any assistance.

t_ch: 为您服务是我的荣幸。
t_en: It's an honor to serve you.

t_ch: 对店里的商品还满意吗？有任何意见，都可以直接向我提出，我们会尽全力改进。
t_en: Are you satisfied with the items in our store? If you have any suggestions, feel free to let me know and we will do our best to improve.

t_ch: 「只是那来自未来的玫瑰，还未盛放……」
t_en: "But that rose from future has yet to bloom..."

t_ch: …啊，非常抱歉！我刚才唱歌唱得有些入神了…您有什么需要吗？
t_en: ...Oops, I'm so sorry! I got a little carried away with my singing just now... What can I do for you?

t_ch: 柯柯娜的眼神变得灵动了起来，然后哼起了那首由她自己创作的歌……
t_en: Cocona's eyes come alive. Then, she starts humming the song she has written herself...

t_ch: 「请闭上眼睛，再往前看」
t_en: "Close your eyes and look ahead."

t_ch: 「那些未完成的画，仍在流淌的歌」
t_en: "Those unfinished paintings and the songs that are still playing."

t_ch: 「那缤纷的世界会是什么模样？」
t_en: "What would that vibrant world look like?"

t_ch: 抱歉，贵宾…只要给我一点时间就好……
t_en: I'm sorry, esteemed guest... I need a little more time...

t_ch: 我已经喝了特调…很快就会好了，很快。
t_en: I've drunk the special concoction... Soon, I'll get better.

t_ch: 悲伤击中了柯柯娜…但她早已习惯了这种处境。
t_en: A wave of sorrow hits Cocona... but she is already used to it.

t_ch: 啊…那种感觉…它又向我袭来了……
t_en: Ah... That feeling... It has come at me again...

t_ch: 但我不会输给它…我已经…不怕它了。
t_en: But I won't be defeated... I'm no longer... afraid of it.

t_ch: 「心灵慰藉特调」…只要一口，一口就好。
t_en: I just need a sip of the Soulheal Special Mix. Just one sip will do.

t_ch: 有些时候，我会被自己的情绪裹挟…甚至可能会忘记说话的礼仪。
t_en: I'll get so caught up in my emotions at times... that I might even forget about my manners when I speak.

t_ch: 贵宾，请您见谅。
t_en: Please bear with me, my esteemed guest.

t_ch: …爱买买，不买滚！
t_en: ...Buy it or leave it!

t_ch: 那六个字如此自然地从柯柯娜口中冒了出来，连她自己都被吓了一跳。
t_en: Even Cocona herself is shocked by her standoffish words.

t_ch: …对、对不起，客人！我不是那个意思，请您听我解释……
t_en: ...I—I'm sorry, my esteemed guest! I didn't mean it! Please hear me out...

t_ch: 苏乐达好处都有啥，谁说中了就送他！
t_en: What's special about SoulGlad? Whoever answers correctly will get SoulGlad for free!

t_ch: 清凉爽口。
t_en: It has a refreshing taste.

t_ch: 包治百病。
t_en: It can cure various diseases.

t_ch: 一天不喝浑身难受。
t_en: I can't go about my day without drinking it.

t_ch: 说得太好了，一看你就是苏乐达的忠实粉丝！拿去吧，我们一向对老客户宠爱有加。
t_en: Well said! You're clearly a loyal fan of SoulGlad! Here's your SoulGlad. We've always treated our loyal customers well.

t_ch: 「喝下这瓶苏乐达，快乐美梦速速达！」
t_en: "Grab a bottle of SoulGlad, and make your dreams a blast!"

t_ch: 「苏乐达好处都有啥，谁说中了就送他。」
t_en: "What are the benefits of SoulGlad? Whoever gets it right wins this!"

t_ch: 「苏乐达——欢乐的源泉、美梦的精华！」
t_en: "SoulGlad — the source of joy, the quintessence of dreams!"

t_ch: 金黄色的饮料如火山般喷发——苏乐达似乎非常喜欢这个宣传设计，就连它们的工厂也是这幅造型。
t_en: The golden drink erupts like a volcano. SoulGlad seems to love this advertising design, and even their factory is designed this way.

t_ch: 嘿，这位{M#少年}{F#少女}，你一定也想驾驶大机器人吧！恶夜钻钻娃超可动素体一定能让你美梦成真！
t_en: Hey {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.}, you must have wanted to try piloting a giant robot! The Diamond Doll action figure can help you realize your dream!

t_ch: 我确实很想。
t_en: I do want to try it.

t_ch: 那还等什么？现在就去最近的潮玩店了解详情吧！这东西最近都卖到断货啊！
t_en: What are you waiting for? Visit your nearest designer shop to learn more about this product! It's been selling like hotcakes lately!

t_ch: 我曾经操控过大机器人。
t_en: I've already done that.

t_ch: 哇哦？！你真是太令人羡慕了！不过你还是可以了解下我们的玩具——这玩意最近都卖到断货了！
t_en: Wow, I'm green with envy! Still, there's no harm in learning more about this product. It's been selling like hotcakes lately!

t_ch: 「恶夜钻钻娃超可动素体，献给每个永恒少年！」
t_en: "The Diamond Doll action figure is designed for those who are forever young!"

t_ch: 广告牌上画着一台超酷的玩具机器人，小孩子和大孩子都没法拒绝。
t_en: There is an illustration of a cool robot toy on the billboard. Adults and children alike find it irresistible.

t_ch: 许多男人和女人都做过开着大机器人拯救城市的梦——倘若真把这玩具放大一千倍，它或许也能毁灭城市。
t_en: Many have dreamt of rescuing the city by piloting giant robots. If this toy could be magnified a thousand times, it might indeed be capable of destroying the city.

t_ch: 哔哔，帕特鲁鲁鲁电电枪。人人有枪，才更好玩！
t_en: Beep-beep! Patrululu's Zappy Gun is here! It's only fun when everyone has a gun!

t_ch: 这位客人，你平时最喜欢用的「武器」是什么呢？
t_en: Hi, may I know which weapon is your favorite?

t_ch: 棒球棍。
t_en: Baseball bat.

t_ch: 呃…是很独特的武器呢！
t_en: Um... That's quite unique!

t_ch: 长枪。
t_en: Lance.

t_ch: 哦~听起来是很酷炫的武器呢！
t_en: I see... Sounds cool!

t_ch: 脑袋。
t_en: My head.

t_ch: …哦，你是指聪明的头脑！
t_en: ...Oh, you mean your brilliant mind!

t_ch: 这么看来，你一定会需要一支酷炫的帕特鲁鲁鲁电电枪了！快去指定门店咨询详情吧！
t_en: It looks like you're going to need a cool Patrululu's Zappy Gun! Head to our selected stores for more information now!

t_ch: 「帕特鲁鲁鲁电电枪，循此苦旅，击落星辰！」
t_en: "Patrululu's Zappy Gun! Embark on a challenging journey of striking down the stars."

t_ch: 许多星际和平影视的电影里，{M#主角}{F#女主角}都会拿上这么一把枪，在最危急的关头给坏蛋致命一击——你也可以买上一把。
t_en: In many films produced by Interastral Peace Media, the {M#lead actors}{F#lead actresses} often use this gun to deal a fatal blow to the villain at the most critical moment. You can get one too.

t_ch: 倘若每个孩子都能得到这么一把玩具枪，他们肯定会收获一段震撼的童年回忆。
t_en: If every kid owned this toy gun, I'm sure they would have a very memorable childhood.

t_ch: 这位客人，您这件衣服是不是很久没有换过了？
t_en: Hi, have you been wearing this outfit for quite some time?

t_ch: 你怎么知道？
t_en: Wait, how did you know?

t_ch: 我有很多套一样的衣服。
t_en: I have many sets of the same outfit.

t_ch: 担心买不到合适的？机会来了！厄皮洛斯服装秀场有着全梦境最时髦的外衣，包您满意——购买任意产品还送苏乐达哟！
t_en: Do you find it hard to get clothes that suit your style? Here comes your chance! You can find the trendiest apparel at the Epirus Apparel Fashion Show! Make any purchase to redeem for free SoulGlad!

t_ch: 「在梦的最前线，追逐潮流的方向——厄皮洛斯服装秀场。」
t_en: "Always the trendsetter — Epirus Apparel Fashion Show."

t_ch: 「车靠贴膜人靠装，厄皮洛斯购物爽。」
t_en: "Clothes make the man. Shop till you drop at the Epirus Apparel Fashion Show."

t_ch: 据说这家服装店的出品非常优秀，再夸张的身材穿上之后都能加分不少。
t_en: The products of this fashion store are said to be capable of making anyone look good.

t_ch: 哟，这位客人，还在用腿跑来跑去？多累啊！
t_en: Hey, there! Are you still moving around on foot? How tiring!

t_ch: 是啊，还能怎么办？
t_en: Yup. What else can I do?

t_ch: 哎，这不就到我出场的时候了嘛。
t_en: Now, let me enlighten you.

t_ch: 梦里不会累。
t_en: I won't get tired in a dream.

t_ch: 身体不累，但是心累嘛。谁会不喜欢开着车到处兜风呢？
t_en: You may not feel tired physically, but what of your spirit? Who wouldn't enjoy going on a car ride?

t_ch: 我会传送。
t_en: I can teleport around.

t_ch: 啊这…这太急功近利了！路上明明有那么多景色不容错过。
t_en: Well... what's the rush? You'll miss out on the scenic view along the way.

t_ch: 只要购买我们的乌通蓬自动车，你就能以王者姿态享受到真正的美梦！现在还有促销哦。
t_en: By purchasing our Utopon Motion Maverick, you'll enjoy a kingly experience in your dream! There's a promotion for this vehicle now!

t_ch: 「我的极限，即是宇宙的极限！乌通蓬自动车。」
t_en: "I can reach as far as the universe's limits. Utopon Motion Maverick."

t_ch: 「乌通蓬自动车，成功人士的豪华尊享。」
t_en: "Utopon Motion Maverick, luxury indulgence for the successful."

t_ch: 广告牌上的车造型奇特，让你怀疑它会不会在行驶时卡住。
t_en: The vehicle shown on the billboard has a peculiar design that makes you wonder if it will get stuck while moving.

t_ch: 嘿，吃了没？
t_en: Hey, how's it going?

t_ch: 没吃。
t_en: I haven't eaten.

t_ch: 没吃？快来幽鲁士！幽鲁士餐饮连锁，填饱你的每一寸味蕾。
t_en: You haven't eaten? Come to Yuluxe's Culinary Chain! You'll be full and satisfied.

t_ch: 吃了。
t_en: I have eaten.

t_ch: 吃了？没关系，快来幽鲁士！幽鲁士餐饮连锁，让你吃了还想吃。
t_en: You have eaten? Come to Yuluxe's Culinary Chain anyway! Our food will make you want more.

t_ch: 梦里又不会感到饥饿…
t_en: No one gets hungry in a dream...

t_ch: 不饿？无所谓，快来幽鲁士！幽鲁士餐饮连锁，用美味为您筑梦。
t_en: You aren't hungry? Come to Yuluxe's Culinary Chain anyway! We'll build your dreamland with our yummy treats.

t_ch: 「幽鲁士餐饮连锁，用美味筑梦。」
t_en: "Yuluxe's Culinary Chain helps build your dream."

t_ch: 「只要一块切片蛋糕，所有烦恼烟散云消。」
t_en: "A slice of cake is all you need to forget about your troubles."

t_ch: 蛋糕上仰望星空的鱼头只是画面效果，该产品并不含有海鲜成分。
t_en: The fish head on the cake that stares into the starry sky is just for illustration purposes. This product doesn't contain any seafood.

t_ch: 「鲱鱼先生」，与你的味蕾乘风破浪！这位客人，来尝尝「鲱鱼先生」柠檬挞吧！
t_en: Mr. Herring's rides the waves with your taste buds! Come on and try Mr. Herring's Lemon Tarts!

t_ch: 看起来有点怪…
t_en: It seems kind of weird...

t_ch: 客人您是在担心画面上的鲱鱼吗？别怕，我们很早就不用这类食材了。
t_en: Are you bothered by the herring in the picture? Fret not. We've stopped using it a long time ago.

t_ch: 如果您想亲自体验一番的话，随时可以到附近的食杂店购买我家产品哦！
t_en: If you're interested in trying our products, you can visit the grocery store in your neighborhood!

t_ch: 「『鲱鱼先生』，与你的味蕾乘风破浪！」
t_en: "Mr. Herring's rides the waves with your taste buds!"

t_ch: 「我的气味，掩盖不住我的美味。」
t_en: "I taste so much better than how I smell."

t_ch: 据说这种食物如今仍在售卖，只是店家去除了其中的鲱鱼成分。
t_en: You can still find this product on the shelf now, but herring has been removed from the recipe.

t_ch: 这是你在「{TEXTJOIN#87}」的专属停车位，永久保留，不额外收费。可以将购买到的车辆停放在此处。
t_en: This is your exclusive parking lot at {TEXTJOIN#87}. The ownership is permanent at zero extra charges. You can park your car here.

t_ch: 这是你在「白日梦酒店」的专属停车位，永久保留，不额外收费。可以将购买到的车辆停放在此处。
t_en: This is your exclusive parking lot at the Reverie. The ownership is permanent at zero extra charges. You can park your car here.

t_ch: 啊，亲爱的主人。从此刻起，我的全部都将只属于你。
t_en: Oh, my dear owner. I'll belong exclusively to you from now on.

t_ch: 我的表盘只为你而转动，我的引擎只因你而轰鸣。排气管里释放的都是我对你的爱意，后视镜里映照出的是铭刻在我心中的、你最美的模样。
t_en: My speedometer moves and my engine roars only for you. What comes out of the exhaust fume is my love for you, and I'll always remember the reflection of your beautiful face in my rearview mirror.

t_ch: 我要用什么才能把你留住？我给你迅捷的启动、帅气的漂移、稳定的急刹。我给你一辆飞车紧紧拥抱着地面的安全感。
t_en: How do I win your heart? By having me, you'll enjoy a swift start of the engine, the ability to make cool drifts, and a reliable emergency brake. Even though I move fast, I can still offer you a sense of security.

t_ch: 我给你……
t_en: I'll give you...

t_ch: 够了够了，你想要啥？
t_en: That's enough. What do you want?

t_ch: 有什么企图直接说吧。
t_en: Just cut to the chase already.

t_ch: 希望你能始终把我展示在车位上。这是匹诺康尼所有车的终极梦想。
t_en: I hope you'll always put me on display in your parking lot. It's the ultimate goal of all vehicles in Penacony.

t_ch: 要是见不到背包外的世界，我肯定会因为寂寞而死的。
t_en: I'll be killed by loneliness if I'm confined in your backpack forever.

t_ch: 就不担心会出事故？
t_en: Aren't you worried about getting into an accident?

t_ch: 对我的驾驶技术这么有信心？
t_en: Do you have that much confidence in my driving skills?

t_ch: 怕什么？反正载具系统还没开放。
t_en: What's there to be afraid of? The vehicle system is not available yet anyway.

t_ch: 啊，亲爱的主人。从此刻起，我的全部都将只属于你。
t_en: Oh, my dear owner. I'll belong exclusively to you from now on.

t_ch: …来吧，我就知道你想上来。
t_en: ...Come on in. You know you want it.

t_ch: 我是辆车，而你是个人类，你的任务是让我的内部熊熊燃烧，我的职责就是让你体验在空中飞驰的感觉。嗯…不觉得这样的双向奔赴，很浪漫吗？
t_en: I'm a car, and you're a human. While you're responsible for keeping the combustion inside me going, I'm in charge of offering you a flying experience. Hmm... Doesn't this sound like a romantic love story?

t_ch: 将速度提到最快，携手在云端漫步，丢掉生活带来的全部烦恼，享受心醉神迷般的华丽幻觉，直到…死亡将我们分开。
t_en: As you put the pedal to the metal, I go at full speed. Together, we travel amid the clouds and forget about all the troubles in our lives. We indulge in the splendid illusion until... death do us part.
